# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: allow-ssh
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      description: Allow SSH traffic from anywhere
      sourceRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "22"

  - name: allow-rdp
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      description: Allow RDP traffic from anywhere
      sourceRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "3389"

  - name: allow-http
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      description: Allow HTTP traffic from anywhere
      sourceRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "80"

  - name: allow-https
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      description: Allow HTTPS traffic from anywhere
      sourceRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "443"
